events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: missing guides near expansion loops in piping hangers/supports, in-service. This is a non-compliant/defective condition. Missing guides near expansion loops means thermal expansion can't be properly directed, causing uncontrolled movement, stress, potential pipe failure. This is a fail.

"decision": "fail",

"findings": [
"Missing pipe guides adjacent to expansion loops allows uncontrolled lateral/axial thermal movement",
"Expansion loop cannot function as designed without guides; loop legs may buckle or transmit thrust to anchors and connected equipment",
"Support/guide installation does not match project support standards and MSS SP-58 guide requirements"
],
"actions": [
"Isolate and relieve thermal load on affected piping if movement is observed",
"Install required guides per project support standards at correct offsets from expansion loop",
"Re-inspect and document guide locations, spacing, and restraint type after correction"
],
"rationale": "Expansion loops rely on guides to direct axial thermal growth into the loop and prevent lateral displacement. Missing guides near an in-service loop indicate a non-compliant support configuration that can cause uncontrolled pipe movement, overstress at anchors/fittings, and potential leakage or failure.",
"references": ["MSS SP-58", "project support standards"]
}
